hold.title: Amazing for Pomade Acne
hold.body: This pomade has reduced my hairline acne to almost nothing. I did an experiment with 4 regular pomades that I have over a 2 month period. Using each one for 2 weeks. All of them caused an uptick in overall breakouts. As soon as I used Clean Challenger the breakouts disappeared. I highly recommend this if you’re suffering from pomade acne. The only downside is that the hold is not great, but if once you get use to it you’ll find ways to make it work.

hold.title: The Price!
hold.body: This is a great shampoo marketed to men. I, however, am a woman with longer hair. I usually wash and rinse twice. 1 bottle barely lasts me a month. I have no problems at all with the shampoo. As a matter fact, I love it. I just can�t spend over $20 a month on shampoo. This particular Amazon purchase, I�m going to be trying a different product. The product I will be trying seems to have good ingredients with more shsmpoo and five dollars cheaper. I never get subscribe and save because that way I have more control over my budget.

hold.title: Best one I've used
hold.body: I've been using this for at least a year and have no plans to stop. Best I've used over a period of about 15 years of hair products. Great hold and no mess.

hold.title: Functional Hold through the whole day
hold.body:
I really like this stuff. At first it was a little weird but once I got used to using it I was impressed with how little I needed to use and how it held my hair in place and I could restyle throughout the day without losing the hold.
If I bump my head or have an itch I can always put my hair right back where I like it.
It has a great map texture. no shininess with a natural clean look.

hold.title: this stuff is the best
hold.body: hair products have always caused acne on my forehead ... until finding this. It goes on easily, provides a medium firm hold, washes off easily, and is an all around winner. Just buy some. I searched all over for this and couldn't be more pleased

hold.title: Best hair product
hold.body: Love this stuff it holds very well and has a matte finish. Better than clay because you don�t have to mix it and can apply right out of the container

hold.title: It truly is unscented!
hold.body: My wife lost her sense of smell and taste due to covid several months ago, but a few months ago she has since started to get them back. Unfortunately, they’ve come back a bit wonky. Almost all hair products cause her to smell “wet dog”. So, after being called a wet dog for the 137th time, I went through 3 other popular brand name hair products to no avail until finally trying Challenger’s Clean. I got the thumbs up from the wife, and immediately ordered another one for my gym bag. It has a pretty good hold as claimed, I just have to adapt to how much to use. It doesn’t rinse out quite as easily as the other products (as I don’t like to over wash my hair), but I’ll make it work because I can actually be in close proximity of my wife again without being told I smell like a wet dog.

grease_problem.title: Naturally have an oily face
grease_problem.body: I’ve tried all the skin care routines. Finally I’ve found something that works for me. Naturally I have very oily skin. I cut my hair every 2 weeks, I workout a lot, and I’m of the age of 20-30 years old. I’ve been using this product for over a year and have never broke out from it.

grease_problem.title: My Hair Won't Leave Home Without It
grease_problem.body:
I just received my second jar of Challenger and wanted to share the love with this product to anyone looking for clean, light bodied hold, with fine, straight hair. That's me. I work a small, pea sized dab into my palm, and work it through my towel dry hair when I get out of the shower, and comb or brush to style. It dries dry, so my hair isn't greasy or heavy either.
Great stuff, and I mentioned this was a resupply; my first jar lasted almost a year, a little bit goes a long way!

grease_problem.title: LOOOOOOVE these! Great products!
grease_problem.body:
I had gotten the Challenger Eye Cream and absolutely LOVE it! Then, I saw the face moisturizer, so I had to try it, and I LOVED it! So, when I saw this set that had both of those AND a serum I hadn’t tried yet, I couldn’t wait to get it!

These come in nice bottles. They feel nice and look nice. Each one has a nice pump that gives you just the right amount of product. The pump works nicely every time.

The serum feels really nice. It glides onto the skin. Absorbs quickly. It doesn’t leave any tacky feeling. My skin feels smooth and hydrated.

The cream is in the thicker side, but not so thick where it feels heavy or takes a long time to rub in. It glides onto the skin very easily. It absorbs quickly leaving behind a very soft, moisturized feel to the skin. This works well under my makeup too. I have normal to dry skin, with some extremely dry areas, and this works well for me. If you have skin that’s more oily, it might feel like too much for you. But, if you have dry skin, I think you’d really like this!

The eye cream is probably my favorite, but it’s hard to choose! My eyes are pretty dry. My eyelids get dry and my under eyes get really dry. Whenever I apply concealer, it will always look horrible unless I make sure my under eyes are moisturized well enough. I’ve been using Glossier Priming Moisturizer Rich cream, but it’s $32 for a jar. A little of it goes a long way so it lasts me a while, but I still wanted to find a cheaper alternative. I found this, it isn’t a ton cheaper, but it’s still cheaper. Plus, I think I might like this even more than the glossier! This is a cream, but it isn’t really thick or thin. It kind of reminds me of a gel type cream consistency, but thicker than a gel. I’d say it has a medium consistency. It glides onto the skin so easily. My under eyes look SOOOOO hydrated after using it! It leaves a dewy, moisturized look to the eyes. They feel soft and smooth. My concealer goes over it so well and looks great!

This set is $49 (at the time of writing this review), which definitely seems pricey to me. But, when I consider I was paying $32 for a jar of the Glossier Priming Moisturizer Rich for under my eyes, I see it as getting 2 additional products I love for $17 more! To me, that’s a great deal! Plus, I LOVE the ingredients in each of these products! I love they are fragrance free, the way they feel on my skin, and the way they look on the skin! In addition to all that, I LOVE that these are made in the US. I don’t need to worry about if something is translated correctly or if info is going to be in English. So, I’m very happy overall!

If you’re looking for a good skin care regimen, I definitely recommend this set!

grease_problem.title: Nice set of products
grease_problem.body:
Challenger Men's Primo - Men's Anti Aging Trio - Face Serum, Face Moisturizer, & Eye Cream - Formulas incl. Copper Tri-Peptide, 4D Hyaluronic Acid, Aloe, Vitamin C & More - Firm Skin & Reduce Wrinkles

These three products work well together. My favorite is the Anti-Aging Eye Cream. The years have added bags under my eyes and they make me look tired all of the time. While it is not a miracle worker, I can see a reduction in the size of the bags and, especially, the darkness. Sometimes they looked almost bruised but not as much anymore. This is something that I've noticed over time. Don't expect it to work overnight. I did and I almost gave up on it. I'm glad that I stuck it out.

I don't have much of an issue with wrinkles so far, and I am hoping that the other two parts of this set keep it that way. The best thing about the face serum and moisturizer is that they are absorbed quickly and don't leave behind any oily residue. My skin is prone to breakouts and I have seen my share of them from other products I've tried over the last year. I have had no problems with breakouts using these products.

The bottles are well packaged in nice boxes with lots of information on them. They're made in the USA and that means that the literature included on the boxes is in legible English that we all can read. The bottles themselves are solid and use a pump system that doesn't include a plastic tube stuck down to the bottom of the bottle. I'm hoping that this means less waste.

As for cost - yes, these products are relatively expensive when compared to other products like them. For my purposes, they are worth it. You are getting what you pay for. And getting them in a set is less expensive that purchasing them separately. I'm impressed with this US based company and their products. I'd prefer to support US companies that make quality products with information that is written in plain English. I will be purchasing more of this product once I am done with what I have.

grease_problem.title: Great budget alternative to more expensive product
grease_problem.body: While I prefer sumotech for my purposes, the Challenger matte paste is a suitable lower cost alternative. My mildly curly hair is between 1-2” on top for the first 2-3 weeks after a cut, and it’s nice to style it with a paste until the curls get too unwieldy. I prefer the effortless look of a matte finish. Challenger is a thick cream that spreads easy and is easy to work through your hair. It has a bit of a sticky texture to it and makes my hair easy to shape. It smells like the salon to me, which isn’t preferable but not bad. My hair had a mild shine after applying, but running my hand through my hair eliminated the shine, and over time it looked perfectly matte. Medium-firm is an accurate description. It’s not firm enough to keep my hair from curling just a bit but my hair isn’t going anywhere. Longer hair might be susceptible to some wind but it seems easy to reshape if needed. I liked the look of my hair with it. Overall, I prefer sumotech. It’s a firmer hold, it’s extremely matte, and scentless, but comparing the 1.5 oz size of each, it is not $17 better than challenger’s. I’m happy with this find!

grease_problem.title: Leaves Face Silky Smooth
grease_problem.body:
I've been trying a lot of different face creams lately, and I have to admit that this is one of my favorites. It moisturizes quite well and leaves my face feeling so silky smooth. It's a great barrier cream that penetrates, yet also protects your skin from the elements. The appearance of fine lines are diminished and even some of the deeper ones are softened. Holds up all day long.

This is one of those face creams that leaves my face so silky smooth that I want to keep rubbing my fingers over my face because it feels so nice. Of course, I don't suggest that you do so.

Probably best for those with normal to dry skin. This face cream is probably a bit too rich for those with oily skin, but great for all others. I'm fine with the scent which only lasts during application.

At $20 (today's price), this is an affordable price for most consumers. I'll be honest with you, I've tried lots of other moisturizers, many above the $100 range, and I actually think that this face cream is just as good, and in a lot of cases, better than most of those. Oh, and I'm a woman, and I've been recommending this face cream to my lady friends. It really is great for both men and women.

grease_problem.title: Works great for my fine hair
grease_problem.body: I just used this product for the first time this morning. I followed the directions wetting my hair, towel drying, then applying the product. As advertised it holds very well and does not have a greasy look like a lot of other products on the market. I have very fine hair and it has always been a problem finding something that works, usually my hair always ends of falling flat. That seems to be a problem of the past with this product. Would absolutely recommend and will be ordering again in the future.

value.title: Perfect texture

The medium firm hold doesnt leave my hair hard and stuck together, it allows my hair to flow naturally instead of being "frozen", yet it still holds its shape well all day. And I have very thick black hair. I've tried many pomades and this is the one I have stuck with for 3+ years now and I absolutely love it (even over Crew, and its way cheaper). 10/10 highly recommend.

works_results.body: My husband & I both love this matte cream pomade. He uses it on damp hair for a bit of structure & control. I work a little bit into the ends after blow drying to provide definition & finish. (Also works great taming stray baby hairs near my part.) Doesn’t flake or leave resudue behind. Also, there is no noticeable perfume in this product! (A similar product by Byrd was giving me migraines. It smelled like a scented candle.) Love this & will buy again!!

As advertised it holds very well and does not have a greasy look like a lot of other products on the market. I have very fine hair and it has always been a problem finding something that works, usually my hair always ends of falling flat. That seems to be a problem of the past with this product. works_results.title: Affordable Mens Eye Cream That Works
works_results.body:
This is an effective, premium eye cream at a very reasonable price. I'd say it works as good or better than product double or triple the price, and it covers all of the bases. Recently 50 years old, I have been using it for a while now and can attest to a reduction in the effects of aging around my eyes. Dark circles are all but gone, puffiness and wrinkles are reduced, and my skin feels hydrated.

I put it on in the morning and evening. It absorbs quickly leaving skin soft and smooth. The container looks good next to my sink along with my other Challenger products and the pump dispenses well. I really like this line of skin care from Primo and plan to keep using it.

Made in the USA

works_results.title: BUY THIS NOW
works_results.body: This stuff is AMAZING. It has taken me so long to find something for my super short hair that holds all day without looking wet or feeling crunchy. I use it right out of the shower (my favorite way) or even on dry hair it works GREAT. I CANNOT recommend this stuff enough. And it will last FOREVER because you really don’t need that much at all. I like that it’s not super gooey it’s more like a thick balm or lotion consistency if that makes sense. Works great for me :)

works_results.title: Husband likes it
works_results.body: Well, my husband hates putting facial moisturizer on, but he's decided that this one will work. It does not have a fragrance, and it's light. It doesn't irritate his skin. He looks for something that isn't super-spendy, but isn't cheap. In other words, something that's careful with ingredients. It looks like this moisturizer has the ingredients that are most important to ME in a facial cream: shea butter, hyaluronic acid, and vitamin c. In this formulation, they have no scent or mineral oil. This works well for my husband, and the price is great.

works_results.title: Fresh Body Wash - Refreshing Cleanliness, Lasting Freshness!
works_results.body: Fresh Body Wash is a game-changer! It cleanses effectively, leaving my skin clean and smooth. With gentle exfoliating beads, it provides a refreshing scrub using either my hand or a loofah. The fragrance is subtle yet invigorating, ensuring a lasting fresh scent. The high-quality ingredients, including Aloe, Vitamin E, Tea Tree Oil, Jojoba Oil, and Silk Amino Acids, nourish and hydrate my skin. It's a reliable choice for combating body odor in sensitive areas like the pits and groin. Fresh Body Wash is a must-have for those seeking a quality body wash that delivers cleanliness and long-lasting freshness.

easy_use.title: Like father, like son!
easy_use.body: My 4 year old son wanted to look like his daddy. I didn’t want to just use anything on his hair. Thankfully this product is clean, light weight, no fragrance and still does the job for both kids and adults! I love using it for my son when he wants to “be fancy” or when his hair grows fast and gets in his eyes. He looks great and it’s super easy to use!

easy_use.title: Nice set of products
easy_use.body:

These three products work well together. My favorite is the Anti-Aging Eye Cream. The years have added bags under my eyes and they make me look tired all of the time. While it is not a miracle worker, I can see a reduction in the size of the bags and, especially, the darkness. Sometimes they looked almost bruised but not as much anymore. This is something that I've noticed over time. Don't expect it to work overnight. I did and I almost gave up on it. I'm glad that I stuck it out.

I don't have much of an issue with wrinkles so far, and I am hoping that the other two parts of this set keep it that way. The best thing about the face serum and moisturizer is that they are absorbed quickly and don't leave behind any oily residue. My skin is prone to breakouts and I have seen my share of them from other products I've tried over the last year. I have had no problems with breakouts using these products.

The bottles are well packaged in nice boxes with lots of information on them. They're made in the USA and that means that the literature included on the boxes is in legible English that we all can read. The bottles themselves are solid and use a pump system that doesn't include a plastic tube stuck down to the bottom of the bottle. I'm hoping that this means less waste.

As for cost - yes, these products are relatively expensive when compared to other products like them. For my purposes, they are worth it. You are getting what you pay for. And getting them in a set is less expensive that purchasing them separately. I'm impressed with this US based company and their products. I'd prefer to support US companies that make quality products with information that is written in plain English. I will be purchasing more of this product once I am done with what I have.

comparison.title: Great budget alternative to more expensive product
comparison.body: While I prefer sumotech for my purposes, the Challenger matte paste is a suitable lower cost alternative. My mildly curly hair is between 1-2” on top for the first 2-3 weeks after a cut, and it’s nice to style it with a paste until the curls get too unwieldy. I prefer the effortless look of a matte finish. Challenger is a thick cream that spreads easy and is easy to work through your hair. It has a bit of a sticky texture to it and makes my hair easy to shape. It smells like the salon to me, which isn’t preferable but not bad. My hair had a mild shine after applying, but running my hand through my hair eliminated the shine, and over time it looked perfectly matte. Medium-firm is an accurate description. It’s not firm enough to keep my hair from curling just a bit but my hair isn’t going anywhere. Longer hair might be susceptible to some wind but it seems easy to reshape if needed. I liked the look of my hair with it. Overall, I prefer sumotech. It’s a firmer hold, it’s extremely matte, and scentless, but comparing the 1.5 oz size of each, it is not $17 better than challenger’s. I’m happy with this find!

comparison.title: Leaves Face Silky Smooth

Holds up all day long.

This is one of those face creams that leaves my face so silky smooth that I want to keep rubbing my fingers over my face because it feels so nice. Of course, I don't suggest that you do so.

Probably best for those with normal to dry skin. This face cream is probably a bit too rich for those with oily skin, but great for all others. I'm fine with the scent which only lasts during application.

At $20 (today's price), this is an affordable price for most consumers. I'll be honest with you, I've tried lots of other moisturizers, many above the $100 range, and I actually think that this face cream is just as good, and in a lot of cases, better than most of those. Oh, and I'm a woman, and I've been recommending this face cream to my lady friends. It really is great for both men and women.

This set is $49 (at the time of writing this review), which definitely seems pricey to me. quality.title: BUY THIS NOW
quality.body: This stuff is AMAZING. It has taken me so long to find something for my super short hair that holds all day without looking wet or feeling crunchy. I use it right out of the shower (my favorite way) or even on dry hair it works GREAT. I CANNOT recommend this stuff enough. And it will last FOREVER because you really don’t need that much at all. I like that it’s not super gooey it’s more like a thick balm or lotion consistency if that makes sense. Works great for me :)

quality.title: Truly Worth Using
quality.body:
I am updating this review after switching to another product for a year or so and coming back.

I stopped using this shampoo and conditioner for a while because I had always used 2-in-1 products before and got drawn back to the convenience. Honestly, I’ve used poor quality hair care products for so much of my life that I barely noticed when my hair got dull, frizzy and breakage-prone again. I did, however, notice when I found myself needing to cut off several inches of damaged hair for the second time in six months.

My hair looked markedly better after a single washing, and after a month it is shiny, healthy-looking and has distinct waves and curls rather than frizz. I can’t believe I quit using it in the first place, and I am amazed at the difference a high-quality shampoo and conditioner can make. My hair smells exactly like thin mint girl scout cookies, which my wife absolutely loves and comments on every time she smells my hair.

Original review below.

This shampoo and conditioner is fantastic- leaves my hair very clean, thick and soft. The shampoo has a nice tingle and both have a cooling effect, which is particularly great in the summer. I love the mint smell, too.

I was hesitant about the price, and in fact each time I re-up I hesitate again, but I can get easily six months out of a set even with hair that goes past my shoulders. A little bit goes a very long way, and I very rarely need to do a ‘rinse and repeat’ with the shampoo as it gets my hair clean enough for a full lather the first round.

Also- the longer I have used these products the healthier my hair and scalp feel. I used to get itchy and flaky in the winter but haven’t seen flakes in a very long time. Great products!

quality.title: Is this real life?
quality.body:
I try my best to always find the pros and cons to every product, but this product makes that tricky. Where has this product been all my life? I love the shampoo and conditioner so so much. I love minty eucalyptus scent and therefore am biased. I love the tingling feeling peppermint leaves behind and felt this sensation for easily a half hour to hour after each use. So if you aren't a fan of either, this may not be for you. But for me, this is perfect and I hope this product never changes!

You don't need much to get the job done. I have thick curly hair and only need a quarter sized amount to wash my hair. Some products you need giant globs, not this. The result is smooth and shiny hair. My hair feels healthy and light versus dry and heavy. This is big for me, having thick heavy hair in general. My curls retain their bounce. My ends and scalp feel great unlike the wirey feeling other shampoos cause; which I blame for dryness causing the wirey split ends.

This product is wonderful and I recommend everyone to try it at least once. I don't think you'll be disappointed. Perhaps you'll have a situation where you talk about how amazing it is that you annoy your significant other about it. I know I do. I love it that much!

Ps. He will get over it ;3

quality.title: Great pair, but not for everyday use
quality.body: I have always had issues with dandruff and this shampoo and conditioner was amazing for my scalp.... For about a week. Afterwards, my scalp got extremely dry and flaky again causing me to resort back to Head and Shoulders. I only recently learned that tea tree oil is not meant for everyday use. Only once or twice a week! If you take that into account, this stuff smells amazing.

quality.title: mells great but...
quality.body: It smells amazing but i am yet to use it but i noticed that the conditioner bottle isn’t nearly as full as the shampoo. little disappointed

scent_negative.title: Stands out from others
scent_negative.body: A few reviews claimed that the smell was too strong or the feel was too much on the scalp but? That's actually what I love about this. Great way to wake up and it just feels CLEAN. Will definitely purchase again!

scent_negative.title: Great hold and no scent
scent_negative.body: This pomade has great hold and no scent. Finally found a hair product that doesn’t smother you with a strong scent all day. Also noticed that my scalp wasn’t all itchy while using this.

scent_negative.title: Very little scent - My new go-to Pomade
scent_negative.body:
If you are like me and don't like heavily scented hair products, especially all those supposedly 'manly' musky scents, then you'll probably like this one. It has a very light 'fresh' scent that goes away fairly quickly. This is different than other matte pomades. It's very sticky and you only need a little to get it styled. So far, this is going to be my go to.

I was using: Old Spice, Sculpting Pomade for a while. Again, very little scent, but production quality changed. I've tried Black Widow Matte Finish and Reuzel Clay Matte Pomade. Both had overpowering scents.

scent_negative.title: An improvement on similar products
scent_negative.body: I have tried a few products like this, others really don't get very sudsy, Keeps is very thin for me and I have always had to add more to get it all going. This stuff is thicker and with a quarter size blob you get quite a lot of coverage and suds for short men's hair. I haven't lost a lot of hair but people in my family can go either way so I might as well use it as my shampoo. I see people comment on dryness, that is a common thing with these hair support shampoos, you have to use a conditioner with it or it does make my my hair dry. I like the scent, it's not too strong. I would go with this one first, it's better in these ways, Keeps is just too thin and you end up using more of it.

scent_negative.title: We were looking for a product without a strong smell.
scent_negative.body: I ordered this for my college age grandson because he wanted something without a strong scent. He says its easy to spread, and easy to wash out. He was very pleased with the product.

scent_negative.title: The eyes are super key to work on for sure
scent_negative.body: So one thing this past year has showed me is just any of the slightest blemishes/lines/bags around my eyes. When the whole bottom of your face is covered it really shows off the eyes. So in comes this eye cream into my newly found regiment. I’m using this before my serum at night and in the morning on it’s own. THe bottle is only an ounce but that has lasted me weeks now with more in the bottle to go. It takes the tiniest of bits pumped out and then worked into the skin around the eyes. It absorbs quickly even after a shower. There is no strong scent to this and I’ve had no reaction or drying of the skin when used even twice a day. Overall I’m happy with the results after a couple weeks & plan to keep it as part of my daily routine no matter how much of my face is getting shown off to come.

scent_negative.title: Clean Hold Without the Shine or Scent
scent_negative.body:
Challenger Fragrance Free Cream Pomade is exactly what I was looking for. It gives a solid, natural hold without making my hair stiff or crunchy. The finish is low to medium shine, so it looks styled but not greasy. 

The fragrance free part is a big plus. There�s no lingering scent competing with cologne or bothering sensitive skin. It applies easily, spreads evenly through the hair, and washes out without a struggle. 

It works well for everyday styles and still has enough control to keep everything in place. If you want something reliable, simple, and scent free, this is a great option. Definitely a repeat buy for me.

thick_hair.title: I LOVE THIS!! NOT JUST FOR MEN!
thick_hair.body:
I LOVE this eye cream!

My eyes are pretty dry. My eyelids get dry and my under eyes get really dry. Whenever I apply concealer, it will always look horrible unless I make sure my under eyes are moisturized well enough. I’ve been using Glossier Priming Moisturizer Rich cream, but it’s $32 for a jar. A little of it goes a long way so it lasts me a while, but I still wanted to find a cheaper alternative. I found this, which I think I might like even more than the glossier!

It is a thicker cream, but not thick where it feels heavy or takes a long time to rub in. It glides onto the skin easily. It absorbs quickly, leaving behind a dewy, moisturized look to the eyes. My concealer goes over it well. I’ve really been enjoying this! So much so I decided to give the face moisturizer a try!

If you’re like me and have dry under eyes and are looking for something to moisturize them, TRY THIS! I don’t think you’ll be disappointed!

thick_hair.title: LOOOOOOVE these! Great products!
thick_hair.body:
I had gotten the Challenger Eye Cream and absolutely LOVE it! Then, I saw the face moisturizer, so I had to try it, and I LOVED it! So, when I saw this set that had both of those AND a serum I hadn’t tried yet, I couldn’t wait to get it!

These come in nice bottles. They feel nice and look nice. Each one has a nice pump that gives you just the right amount of product. The pump works nicely every time.

The serum feels really nice. It glides onto the skin. Absorbs quickly. It doesn’t leave any tacky feeling. My skin feels smooth and hydrated.

The cream is in the thicker side, but not so thick where it feels heavy or takes a long time to rub in. It glides onto the skin very easily. It absorbs quickly leaving behind a very soft, moisturized feel to the skin. This works well under my makeup too. I have normal to dry skin, with some extremely dry areas, and this works well for me. If you have skin that’s more oily, it might feel like too much for you. But, if you have dry skin, I think you’d really like this!

The eye cream is probably my favorite, but it’s hard to choose! My eyes are pretty dry. My eyelids get dry and my under eyes get really dry. Whenever I apply concealer, it will always look horrible unless I make sure my under eyes are moisturized well enough. I’ve been using Glossier Priming Moisturizer Rich cream, but it’s $32 for a jar. A little of it goes a long way so it lasts me a while, but I still wanted to find a cheaper alternative. I found this, it isn’t a ton cheaper, but it’s still cheaper. Plus, I think I might like this even more than the glossier! This is a cream, but it isn’t really thick or thin. It kind of reminds me of a gel type cream consistency, but thicker than a gel. I’d say it has a medium consistency. It glides onto the skin so easily. My under eyes look SOOOOO hydrated after using it! It leaves a dewy, moisturized look to the eyes. They feel soft and smooth. My concealer goes over it so well and looks great!

This set is $49 (at the time of writing this review), which definitely seems pricey to me. But, when I consider I was paying $32 for a jar of the Glossier Priming Moisturizer Rich for under my eyes, I see it as getting 2 additional products I love for $17 more! To me, that’s a great deal! Plus, I LOVE the ingredients in each of these products! I love they are fragrance free, the way they feel on my skin, and the way they look on the skin! In addition to all that, I LOVE that these are made in the US. I don’t need to worry about if something is translated correctly or if info is going to be in English. So, I’m very happy overall!

If you’re looking for a good skin care regimen, I definitely recommend this set!

thick_hair.title: Great budget alternative to more expensive product
thick_hair.body: While I prefer sumotech for my purposes, the Challenger matte paste is a suitable lower cost alternative. My mildly curly hair is between 1-2” on top for the first 2-3 weeks after a cut, and it’s nice to style it with a paste until the curls get too unwieldy. I prefer the effortless look of a matte finish. Challenger is a thick cream that spreads easy and is easy to work through your hair. It has a bit of a sticky texture to it and makes my hair easy to shape. It smells like the salon to me, which isn’t preferable but not bad. My hair had a mild shine after applying, but running my hand through my hair eliminated the shine, and over time it looked perfectly matte. Medium-firm is an accurate description. It’s not firm enough to keep my hair from curling just a bit but my hair isn’t going anywhere. Longer hair might be susceptible to some wind but it seems easy to reshape if needed. I liked the look of my hair with it. Overall, I prefer sumotech. It’s a firmer hold, it’s extremely matte, and scentless, but comparing the 1.5 oz size of each, it is not $17 better than challenger’s. I’m happy with this find!

thick_hair.title: Perfect texture
thick_hair.body: Other pomades I've tried are usually chalky and it usually doesnt mix well in my hand or my hair. Challenger is the perfect texture for a cream/pomade. The medium firm hold doesnt leave my hair hard and stuck together, it allows my hair to flow naturally instead of being "frozen", yet it still holds its shape well all day. And I have very thick black hair. I've tried many pomades and this is the one I have stuck with for 3+ years now and I absolutely love it (even over Crew, and its way cheaper). 10/10 highly recommend.

thick_hair.title: Cream like texture, light hold, matte
thick_hair.body: Smooth cream like texture, slight odor of wax, light-med hold, touchable soft hair. Very good product. Kinda similar to the usually cheaper but thicker/somewhat smellier tigi bedhead matte separation, but lighter/creamier texture. One of my favorite products. Prefer over the tigi, various crew, viking, baxter, clay/waxes I have tried so far

thick_hair.title: The Best I've Found
thick_hair.body: I have thick, heavy hair, so finding a pomade that actually styles it has been a struggle. This is the best I've found, and it actually holds my hair in place for most of the workday. There's no grease or additional shine; I love how natural my hair looks after I've applied the pomade. It took me a bit to get used to the texture of it in the container, but it doesn't bother me now, and I appreciate that it has no fragrance. I have also sensitive skin, and this pomade hasn't caused any breakouts, even if I forget to wash it out of my hair at the end of the night.

thick_hair.title: Best creamy pomade on the market
thick_hair.body: I love this cream pomade . It�s the best of all the pomades I have ever used. I won�t try anything else anymore. It�s super thick. It tames the frizz better than any other pomade even in humid weather . It has a flexible hold, it�s fragrance free and it�s not greasy . It mixes well with products. This product checks all the boxes. I hope they don�t stop making this product or change the ingredients. I would be so disappointed. I just purchased 2 more from the company because I don�t know if they��ll stop making it. I won�t buy more because I believe it has a shelf life. And it�s above my budget but I like it that much .

fragrance_free.title: Like father, like son!
fragrance_free.body: My 4 year old son wanted to look like his daddy. I didn’t want to just use anything on his hair. Thankfully this product is clean, light weight, no fragrance and still does the job for both kids and adults! I love using it for my son when he wants to “be fancy” or when his hair grows fast and gets in his eyes. He looks great and it’s super easy to use!

fragrance_free.body: Bought this looking for a hair product for my husband that wasn't perfume-y. It really is unscented, not that weird 'unscented' that you can still smell, but actually unscented. Consistency is just right. Easy to work with, but not gooey. We will be buying this from now on. I hope they never change it

I have also sensitive skin, and this pomade hasn't caused any breakouts, even if I forget to wash it out of my hair at the end of the night.

fragrance_free.body: I�ve tried a lot of pomades, and this one just gets it right. It gives light to medium hold without feeling heavy or greasy, and best of all - it�s completely fragrance free. No weird artificial smell lingering all day. It also rinses out easily with just water, leaving zero residue or buildup the next morning. You can tell the formula was made by someone who actually uses this stuff every day. My new go-to.

fragrance_free.title: Fragrance free
fragrance_free.body: I have used several different hair products and this one works as well or better than all the others, plus it’s fragrance free and that makes my wife very happy! “Happy wife, happy life “!

natural_clean.title: Naturally have an oily face
natural_clean.body: I’ve tried all the skin care routines. Finally I’ve found something that works for me. Naturally I have very oily skin. I cut my hair every 2 weeks, I workout a lot, and I’m of the age of 20-30 years old. I’ve been using this product for over a year and have never broke out from it.

natural_clean.title: A little dab will do you
natural_clean.body: I have never used a lot of product in my hair but as I greyed it required a bit of taming. I use this on the spots that needs it. I apply to the trouble spots and comb it out. It has a natural feel and washes out cleanly. This product is better than I expected.

natural_clean.title: Functional Hold through the whole day
natural_clean.body:
I really like this stuff. At first it was a little weird but once I got used to using it I was impressed with how little I needed to use and how it held my hair in place and I could restyle throughout the day without losing the hold.
If I bump my head or have an itch I can always put my hair right back where I like it.
It has a great map texture. no shininess with a natural clean look.

natural_clean.body: Other pomades I've tried are usually chalky and it usually doesnt mix well in my hand or my hair. Challenger is the perfect texture for a cream/pomade. The medium firm hold doesnt leave my hair hard and stuck together, it allows my hair to flow naturally instead of being "frozen", yet it still holds its shape well all day. And I have very thick black hair. I've tried many pomades and this is the one I have stuck with for 3+ years now and I absolutely love it (even over Crew, and its way cheaper). 10/10 highly recommend.

This is the best I've found, and it actually holds my hair in place for most of the workday. There's no grease or additional shine; I love how natural my hair looks after I've applied the pomade. It took me a bit to get used to the texture of it in the container, but it doesn't bother me now, and I appreciate that it has no fragrance. I have also sensitive skin, and this pomade hasn't caused any breakouts, even if I forget to wash it out of my hair at the end of the night.

natural_clean.title: Blemish clearing body wash
natural_clean.body:
What I most enjoyed about this product was the ingredients. Very natural and not harsh on the skin. The exfoliating beads definitely helped clear up some of the blemishes I've always had on my upper arms where I had small red bumps due to what I think are just clogged pores. That's amazing.
What I think needs to be improved upon is the scent. I'd like it to be a bit stronger and maybe a little less "floral" smelling. It says "fresh" on the bottle, and I was expecting something zesty or minty. That's just me though. Great bodywash overall.

natural_clean.title: The smell is incredible.
natural_clean.body: This Challenger Conditioner smells so good! It’s a little peppermint mixed with Shea butter smell in one which i think is more appealing to women then men. It is creamy and thick like Shea butter. I tried it but my hair is dry and needs more a more moisturizing conditioner tho it did work I had to add leave in conditioner to my ends. My husband said it was great and left his hair softer than shampoo alone. It came cellophane packaged to prevent leaks. It’s sulfate free, safe for color treated and made in the good ole USA.

thin_hair.title: Cleans and conditions my hair making it soft and full
thin_hair.body: I have fine, thin hair and it has been difficult to find a product that will make my hair look fuller and feel nice and soft. I live in an area where the air is dry most of the year which drys out my hair making it feel rough. This product has solved those issue better than anything I have tried before. The Tee Tree is supposed to work well with my type of hair and it does this very well.

thin_hair.title: Works great for my fine hair
thin_hair.body: I just used this product for the first time this morning. I followed the directions wetting my hair, towel drying, then applying the product. As advertised it holds very well and does not have a greasy look like a lot of other products on the market. I have very fine hair and it has always been a problem finding something that works, usually my hair always ends of falling flat. That seems to be a problem of the past with this product. Would absolutely recommend and will be ordering again in the future.

thin_hair.title: Non Scented Excellent Product
thin_hair.body:
I am on my 3rd can of this and love it.
Ignore the negative reviews.
I have thinning whispy hair that I keep short (older dude)
Decades of trial and error with all sorts of gels/cremes/foams/ect...
And Im simply burned out on everything being scented.
Im going to work, not out clubbin, no need to smell like a gigolo.
Excellent formula, non scented, overall great stuff!
Highly recommended.

thin_hair.title: Best Stuff Ever
thin_hair.body:
I never write reviews, but this stuff is great. I think its a little odd that it is specifically listed as "men's" as though only a man would want to create texture with firm hold for their hairstyle.

The things I love most about this product are 1) it is completely unscented. I wish more products were unscented because scent sensitivity and allergies are rampant and the world is smelly enough without adding yet another scented product to it. 2) It really adds fantastic texture and has a great firm hold. I have fine hair that is always looking for an excuse to go limp and be flat...this stuff gives me great volume and holds all day with no issues, even in super high heat and humidity. I think the biggest learning curve for me was taking a little, pea sized scoop out and making sure to rub it into my fingertips until there was no more white showing, it was just clear, then apply it to the roots and then the chunks here and there I want to hold and texture. It washes off hands fast and easy with just water and a little soap and it washes out of hair super easy also. I don't use conditioner in my hair and i do not find this product overly drying at all.

I was afraid to order this because I've gone through so many products that just don't work and it's such a waste, but this stuff is awesome. I've ordered it twice now and I'm writing this review because I want this company to stay in business and keep making this fabulous unscented hair goop! If you are someone who has to use unscented products out of necessity- then you probably know how limited the choices are when it comes to hair products and the ones you do find are usually a massive compromise- this one isn't! It's really great quality stuff that works perfectly! No compromise! (Maybe this company will start making unscented hairspray that doesn't suck too!!! 🤞).

thin_hair.title: Highly Recommend
thin_hair.body:
I have thinning hair at my crown and need a product that will hold my hair up so it stays up and gives me the best look possible.

This is a great product, the best I have tried. Highly recommend.

thin_hair.title: Highly Recommend

I have thinning hair at my crown and need a product that will hold my hair up so it stays up and gives me the best look possible.

This is a great product, the best I have tried. Highly recommend.

thin_hair.body: Using now instead of crew fiber. Doesn't get stuck under my wedding ring and jam up my sink yet still holds great and leaves my thinning hair looking fuller!!

humidity.title: It truly is unscented!
humidity.body: My wife lost her sense of smell and taste due to covid several months ago, but a few months ago she has since started to get them back. Unfortunately, they’ve come back a bit wonky. Almost all hair products cause her to smell “wet dog”. So, after being called a wet dog for the 137th time, I went through 3 other popular brand name hair products to no avail until finally trying Challenger’s Clean. I got the thumbs up from the wife, and immediately ordered another one for my gym bag. It has a pretty good hold as claimed, I just have to adapt to how much to use. It doesn’t rinse out quite as easily as the other products (as I don’t like to over wash my hair), but I’ll make it work because I can actually be in close proximity of my wife again without being told I smell like a wet dog.

humidity.title: Fantastic hair product for men & women!
humidity.body: My husband & I both love this matte cream pomade. He uses it on damp hair for a bit of structure & control. I work a little bit into the ends after blow drying to provide definition & finish. (Also works great taming stray baby hairs near my part.) Doesn’t flake or leave resudue behind. Also, there is no noticeable perfume in this product! (A similar product by Byrd was giving me migraines. It smelled like a scented candle.) Love this & will buy again!!

humidity.body: I love it. Finally a pomade with a firm hold that does not make your hair look sopping wet. Ive seen some reviews of it being malleable, from my experience it is not. Dries more like a gel. I have a job that I frequently sweat at, this holds up well.

humidity.title: Best Stuff Ever
humidity.body:
I never write reviews, but this stuff is great. I think its a little odd that it is specifically listed as "men's" as though only a man would want to create texture with firm hold for their hairstyle.

The things I love most about this product are 1) it is completely unscented. I wish more products were unscented because scent sensitivity and allergies are rampant and the world is smelly enough without adding yet another scented product to it. 2) It really adds fantastic texture and has a great firm hold. I have fine hair that is always looking for an excuse to go limp and be flat...this stuff gives me great volume and holds all day with no issues, even in super high heat and humidity. I think the biggest learning curve for me was taking a little, pea sized scoop out and making sure to rub it into my fingertips until there was no more white showing, it was just clear, then apply it to the roots and then the chunks here and there I want to hold and texture. It washes off hands fast and easy with just water and a little soap and it washes out of hair super easy also. I don't use conditioner in my hair and i do not find this product overly drying at all.

I was afraid to order this because I've gone through so many products that just don't work and it's such a waste, but this stuff is awesome. I've ordered it twice now and I'm writing this review because I want this company to stay in business and keep making this fabulous unscented hair goop! If you are someone who has to use unscented products out of necessity- then you probably know how limited the choices are when it comes to hair products and the ones you do find are usually a massive compromise- this one isn't! It's really great quality stuff that works perfectly! No compromise! (Maybe this company will start making unscented hairspray that doesn't suck too!!! 🤞).

humidity.title: Overall great
humidity.body: Great product made of ll natural ingredients. It feels and smells great. It takes a lot of shampoo to lather which is annoying given the price, but my hair feels amazing. There’s a little tingling sensation after showering which is also amazing. I have some skin breakouts on my forehead if I use it too often, I believe it’s from the biotin of the conditioner I guess we can’t have everything hahaha at least my hair loss has diminished visibly. Way less hair in the shower drain.

irritation_problem.title: Amazing for Pomade Acne
irritation_problem.body: This pomade has reduced my hairline acne to almost nothing. I did an experiment with 4 regular pomades that I have over a 2 month period. Using each one for 2 weeks. All of them caused an uptick in overall breakouts. As soon as I used Clean Challenger the breakouts disappeared. I highly recommend this if you’re suffering from pomade acne. The only downside is that the hold is not great, but if once you get use to it you’ll find ways to make it work.

irritation_problem.title: Nice set of products
irritation_problem.body:
Challenger Men's Primo - Men's Anti Aging Trio - Face Serum, Face Moisturizer, & Eye Cream - Formulas incl. Copper Tri-Peptide, 4D Hyaluronic Acid, Aloe, Vitamin C & More - Firm Skin & Reduce Wrinkles

These three products work well together. My favorite is the Anti-Aging Eye Cream. The years have added bags under my eyes and they make me look tired all of the time. While it is not a miracle worker, I can see a reduction in the size of the bags and, especially, the darkness. Sometimes they looked almost bruised but not as much anymore. This is something that I've noticed over time. Don't expect it to work overnight. I did and I almost gave up on it. I'm glad that I stuck it out.

I don't have much of an issue with wrinkles so far, and I am hoping that the other two parts of this set keep it that way. The best thing about the face serum and moisturizer is that they are absorbed quickly and don't leave behind any oily residue. My skin is prone to breakouts and I have seen my share of them from other products I've tried over the last year. I have had no problems with breakouts using these products.

The bottles are well packaged in nice boxes with lots of information on them. They're made in the USA and that means that the literature included on the boxes is in legible English that we all can read. The bottles themselves are solid and use a pump system that doesn't include a plastic tube stuck down to the bottom of the bottle. I'm hoping that this means less waste.

As for cost - yes, these products are relatively expensive when compared to other products like them. For my purposes, they are worth it. You are getting what you pay for. And getting them in a set is less expensive that purchasing them separately. I'm impressed with this US based company and their products. I'd prefer to support US companies that make quality products with information that is written in plain English. I will be purchasing more of this product once I am done with what I have.

irritation_problem.title: Non Scented Excellent Product
irritation_problem.body:
I am on my 3rd can of this and love it.
Ignore the negative reviews.
I have thinning whispy hair that I keep short (older dude)
Decades of trial and error with all sorts of gels/cremes/foams/ect...
And Im simply burned out on everything being scented.
Im going to work, not out clubbin, no need to smell like a gigolo.
Excellent formula, non scented, overall great stuff!
Highly recommended.

irritation_problem.title: The Best I've Found
irritation_problem.body: I have thick, heavy hair, so finding a pomade that actually styles it has been a struggle. This is the best I've found, and it actually holds my hair in place for most of the workday. There's no grease or additional shine; I love how natural my hair looks after I've applied the pomade. It took me a bit to get used to the texture of it in the container, but it doesn't bother me now, and I appreciate that it has no fragrance. I have also sensitive skin, and this pomade hasn't caused any breakouts, even if I forget to wash it out of my hair at the end of the night.

irritation_problem.title: Not just for men
irritation_problem.body:
LOVE the hold of this pomade! I have severe fragrance allergies and searched to find a hair gel that would hold my spiked hair and not cause a reaction to the smell.
I’m on my third container of Challenger and will continue to use this product.
A little goes a long way so it’s very economical too.

irritation_problem.title: EXCELLENT POMADE THAT WON'T MAKE ME BREAKOUT!!
irritation_problem.body: I almost never write reviews but I really feel compelled to in this case. I'm not sure how long this product has been available, but I wish I had discovered it sooner! I need to use pomade in my hair for it to look best. The problem is that every one I've used has made me breakout into small pimples along and near my hairline. When I googled "hair pomade that won't clog your pores", I honestly didn't expect to get a single result, but to my surprise and delight, I found this product and, after seeing all the great reviews, I bought it immediately. Now I can't speak to its claim of being non-comedogenic just yet, but what I can say is that this pomade makes my hair look and feel great! Better than any other pomade I've ever used! It's light while having excellent hold, without making my hair stiff or crunchy. My first time using it, i rode my motorized scooter, with a fare amount of wind on top of it, and there wasn't a hair out of place. If this non-comedogenic claim holds true, this product is a game changer! Don't hesitate, just buy it!

irritation_problem.title: Truly Worth Using
irritation_problem.body:
I am updating this review after switching to another product for a year or so and coming back.

I stopped using this shampoo and conditioner for a while because I had always used 2-in-1 products before and got drawn back to the convenience. Honestly, I’ve used poor quality hair care products for so much of my life that I barely noticed when my hair got dull, frizzy and breakage-prone again. I did, however, notice when I found myself needing to cut off several inches of damaged hair for the second time in six months.

My hair looked markedly better after a single washing, and after a month it is shiny, healthy-looking and has distinct waves and curls rather than frizz. I can’t believe I quit using it in the first place, and I am amazed at the difference a high-quality shampoo and conditioner can make. My hair smells exactly like thin mint girl scout cookies, which my wife absolutely loves and comments on every time she smells my hair.

Original review below.

This shampoo and conditioner is fantastic- leaves my hair very clean, thick and soft. The shampoo has a nice tingle and both have a cooling effect, which is particularly great in the summer. I love the mint smell, too.

I was hesitant about the price, and in fact each time I re-up I hesitate again, but I can get easily six months out of a set even with hair that goes past my shoulders. A little bit goes a very long way, and I very rarely need to do a ‘rinse and repeat’ with the shampoo as it gets my hair clean enough for a full lather the first round.

Also- the longer I have used these products the healthier my hair and scalp feel. I used to get itchy and flaky in the winter but haven’t seen flakes in a very long time. Great products!

style_finish.title: Best hair product
style_finish.body: Love this stuff it holds very well and has a matte finish. Better than clay because you don�t have to mix it and can apply right out of the container

style_finish.title: Great budget alternative to more expensive product
style_finish.body: While I prefer sumotech for my purposes, the Challenger matte paste is a suitable lower cost alternative. My mildly curly hair is between 1-2” on top for the first 2-3 weeks after a cut, and it’s nice to style it with a paste until the curls get too unwieldy. I prefer the effortless look of a matte finish. Challenger is a thick cream that spreads easy and is easy to work through your hair. It has a bit of a sticky texture to it and makes my hair easy to shape. It smells like the salon to me, which isn’t preferable but not bad. My hair had a mild shine after applying, but running my hand through my hair eliminated the shine, and over time it looked perfectly matte. Medium-firm is an accurate description. It’s not firm enough to keep my hair from curling just a bit but my hair isn’t going anywhere. Longer hair might be susceptible to some wind but it seems easy to reshape if needed. I liked the look of my hair with it. Overall, I prefer sumotech. It’s a firmer hold, it’s extremely matte, and scentless, but comparing the 1.5 oz size of each, it is not $17 better than challenger’s. I’m happy with this find!

style_finish.title: Lightweight and nice hold!
style_finish.body: I love this hair product so much! Keeps my hairstyle in place without being too heavy to weigh it down. Plus the scent is really nice and subtle.

style_finish.title: Fresh Body Wash - Refreshing Cleanliness, Lasting Freshness!
style_finish.body: Fresh Body Wash is a game-changer! It cleanses effectively, leaving my skin clean and smooth. With gentle exfoliating beads, it provides a refreshing scrub using either my hand or a loofah. The fragrance is subtle yet invigorating, ensuring a lasting fresh scent. The high-quality ingredients, including Aloe, Vitamin E, Tea Tree Oil, Jojoba Oil, and Silk Amino Acids, nourish and hydrate my skin. It's a reliable choice for combating body odor in sensitive areas like the pits and groin. Fresh Body Wash is a must-have for those seeking a quality body wash that delivers cleanliness and long-lasting freshness.

style_finish.body: Great product. I tried all the expensive name brand products but this one is the best. I’ve got grey coarse hair. This holds the hair down yet not sticky and also makes the hair look not so dry. Not oily nor sticky. Looks natural. One can lasts several months for me.

style_finish.body: Easily one of the best hair styling products I’ve ever used. I prefer a more matte finish and a stronger hold with out being to much like a traditional pomade with shine. A more matte finish is exactly what you get

grease_free.body: I bought this pomade for styling a doll’s wig. It has good hold and yet also washes off easily. It is not greasy or oily which I appreciate. But best of all- it does not smell. Like anything. At all. And that’s great because as someone with Mast Cell Activation Syndrome living in the same household as someone ELSE with the same condition, we don’t do very well with scents. It was very hard to find a well-reviewed pomade that was fragrance-free so I really appreciate this product! If you have issues with fragrances, buy this!

gift.title: Spendy but so luxurious
gift.body:
I've tried and liked the conditioner before, and decided to add the shampoo into the mix. It's more than my normal drug store products, and so, so worth it.

The shampoo cleanses without stripping natural oils - after trying many, many different types this is one of the only ones that leaves hair feeling clean, fresh, soft, and well... like hair should feel. While I feared the tea tree would be too strong, it's present but not overpowering.

Often peppermint in conditioners can be too minty, too strong, and leave too much of a tingly sensation behind.

In this blend it helps open sinuses while being uses, as well as the aforementioned tingle. However, it lasts only a slight amount of time after it's rinsed out, so it's pleasant rather than obnoxious.

The conditioner is thick and rich, suitable for detangling my longish hair as well as helping smooth it. The scent is an unexpectedly lovely blend of vanilla and peppermint.

gift.title: Great hold - new favorite hair product - would recommend!
gift.body:
I got this as a gift and it has become my new go-to for hair product. It doesn't take much to have a strong hold that last days. Not greasy like come other products. It held up well against my extra thick hair. The picture I'm including is from 24 hours after applying it for the first time.

It's also the perfect size for travel if you have to get on a plane.

It's a great value because a small amount goes a long way.

I do collect hair products from time to time and plan on trying the other options from this brand.
